meta_description: Precision CNC turning services at JLCCNC for engineers and businesses, offering high-quality machining for metals and plastics with fast turnaround.

sections.heading: CNC Turning
sections.text: CNC Turning CNC Turning is a machining process that revolves a workpiece while a cutting tool removes material to create cylindrical or conical shapes. It is commonly used for producing components like shafts, pins, and bushings with high precision. Get Instant Quote

sections.heading: Available Materials for CNC Turning
sections.text: Available Materials for CNC Turning CNC Turning is suitable for various materials such as metals (Aluminum, Steel, Brass, Copper), plastics (Acrylic, Nylon, ABS), composites (carbon fiber, fiberglass), and foams. The suitability depends on the material's machinability, which considers properties like hardness and thermal conductivity.Here are the materials JLCCNC can provide for CNC Turning. Aluminum Brass Pom Copper Fiberglass See All Materials >

sections.heading: CNC Turning Design Guidelines
sections.text: CNC Turning Design Guidelines Features Description Max Build Size Ø230, length 300 Minimum Build Size Ø3 Recommend Size 6-230mm Recommend Accuracy ±0.05mm

sections.heading: How Is CNC Turning Machine Working?
sections.text: How Is CNC Turning Machine Working? A CNC turning machine operates by rotating a workpiece around its axis while a cutting tool moves along a programmed path to remove material and create the desired shape and features.
